2174180.name: OnlySociety: Dawn
2174180.description:
Only Society Dawn is a shooter video game developed and published by Code Society.

Time is never ending cycle. When there is good; there is evil. When evil approached, there is always some who refuse to surrender. This is how balance is created. The battle is never the beginning and will never be the last.

Enemy will spawn in waves, obtain better weapon by looting the dead and survive Dark Rock minions.
Player view can change from explorer mode in third person and shooting mode in first person.
With the dynamic weather system, player is able to experience real world environment transition in this apocalypse fantasy world.

Survive Dark Rock summons, shoot them up with Homo Sapiens weapons from the Midgard.
2174180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
